about.heading: About
about.p1: We are a team of mushroom enthusiasts, researchers, and natural wellness practitioners united by a fascination with the remarkable potential of fungi.
about.p2: For years, we have explored the world of functional mushrooms, traditional herbal knowledge, and modern scientific discoveries, seeking to fulfill our understanding of how natural compounds can support everyday wellbeing. Our experience in mycology and botanical formulation allows us to create thoughtful blends designed for modern lifestyles.
about.p3: At Akhali Shen, we believe that transformation does not happen overnight. It is a gradual process of restoring balance, building resilience, and reconnecting with what helps us feel our best. Through carefully selected ingredients, continuous learning, and respect for both nature and science, we aim to make that journey more accessible for everyone.

certPage.heading: Certification
certPage.subtitle: Safety and quality are at the core of everything we do.
certPage.p1: On this page you can explore laboratory analyses, quality control reports, and certifications related to our products. Each document reflects our commitment to safety, purity, and consistently high standards.

productionPage.heading: Production
productionPage.subtitle: For us, production begins with observation.
productionPage.p1: As mycology enthusiasts, we spend countless hours studying mushrooms in their natural habitats, learning from ecosystems that have perfected their own balance over millions of years. Some of the mushrooms used in our work are responsibly collected by our team, while others come from carefully selected cultivators who share our standards for quality and sustainability.
productionPage.p2: Back in our laboratory, every ingredient is examined, documented, and prepared with attention to detail. We approach this process with both scientific discipline and genuine respect for the organisms we work with. Each formulation is the result of research, testing, and a continuous desire to better understand the remarkable properties of functional fungi.
productionPage.p3: From forest to laboratory, every step reflects our belief that quality begins with knowledge, patience, and respect for nature.

safetyPage.heading: Safety
safetyPage.p1: Product quality and customer safety are our highest priorities. Every mushroom is collected, processed, and tested according to strict quality standards. However, natural origin does not guarantee suitability for every individual.
safetyPage.fungiList: Lion's Mane, Cordyceps, Turkey Tail, Reishi, Shiitake, Maitake, and Chaga have a long history of traditional use and continue to be studied by modern science.
safetyPage.b1: Individual sensitivities and allergies may occur
safetyPage.b3: Certain mushrooms may interact with medications
safetyPage.b4: Individuals with autoimmune conditions should seek professional advice
safetyPage.b5: Consultation with a healthcare professional is recommended during pregnancy or breastfeeding
safetyPage.disclaimer: Our products are not intended to diagnose, treat, cure, or prevent any disease.
safetyPage.warning1: Discontinue use immediately if adverse effects occur
safetyPage.footer: Responsible and informed use is essential for minimizing risk.
